text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I spot Agnes Tachyon fast asleep<n>while standing
perfectly upright.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Worried she might not be feeling well,<n>I decide to
carry her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Where am I? Ah, I see. So you<n>carried me
here.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Good grief, what a miscalculation on<n>my part.
Umamusume though I may<n>be, getting enough
sleep is still vital.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yet despite writing without ceasing for<n>rest or
sleep, the quality of my thesis<n>didn't suffer at all.
What an important<n>finding.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It appears as though I have slept too<n>much now. I
must return to writing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: But of course! What's wrong with<n>that?
choice_data_list: You're just going to power through it?
You're just going to power through it?

Sounds like you're writing a pretty complicated
thesis.

Sounds like you're writing a pretty complicated
thesis.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: But of course! What's wrong with<n>that?
choice_data_list: You're just going to power through it?
You're just going to power through it?

Sounds like you're writing a pretty complicated
thesis.

Sounds like you're writing a pretty complicated
thesis.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Power? Yes, of course. Intellectual<n>stimulation far
surpasses physical<n>limits!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Intrigued, are we? Then allow me to<n>educate you
on how one can<n>strengthen one's body through<n>
knowledge. The key is...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! I am merely collating my<n>research
findings. There just so<n>happen to be a lot of
them.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, could it be you are interested in<n>what my
thesis is about? Ah, but of<n>course you are! I'm
more than happy<n>to elaborate on it. To begin...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And that's all there is. Goodness,<n>have I been
talking for this long?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we continue this<n>conversation at my
lab? You can see<n>what I'm talking about for
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's fascinating, I assure you. By<n>rapidly
stimulating one's metabolism,<n>it's possible to
vastly increase the<n>amount of muscular
hypertrophy—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh? I wasn't even done with my<n>explanation...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I politely decline Agnes Tachyon's<n>invitation by
making a swift exit from<n>the scene.
